bids.reasoning: Since this is the opening round of the negotiation, there is no previous offer to influence my bid. Therefore, I will propose the bid that maximizes my utility by selecting the best-valued options for each issue according to my preference context. Time pressure is not yet a factor, so my proposal will aim to give me the highest utility without accounting for any concessions at this point.

Given the early stage of negotiation at time_fraction 0.02, I maintain an initial approach of making offers that maximize my utility. The opponent's extreme offer (all "valueA") is far from my interest, indicating they might be setting an anchor. I will keep my offer from round 1 as it represents the highest utility bid for me, without immediate pressure to concede significantly.

The opponent's offers remain at their minimum utility for me, and their messages suggest a desire for mutual benefit but offer no concessions.
